name: CHINA PHARMA HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: China Pharma Holdings, Inc. is a Nevada holding company operating through its wholly owned subsidiary Hainan Helpson Medical and Biotechnology Co., Ltd. (Helpson) in China. Helpson develops, manufactures, and markets pharmaceutical products including dry powder injectables, liquid injectables, tablets, capsules, and cephalosporin oral solutions. As of December 31, 2025, the company holds rights to manufacture 19 pharmaceutical products across basic generic drugs, first-to-market generic drugs, and Modern Traditional Chinese Medicines (TCMs), sold primarily on a prescription basis in the PRC.

products.name: Dry Powder Injectables
products.description: Prescription pharmaceutical injectables approved by NMPA for various therapeutic indications.

products.name: Liquid Injectables
products.description: Prescription liquid injectable pharmaceutical products manufactured under GMP standards.

products.name: Tablets
products.description: Oral tablet formulations of generic and TCM pharmaceutical products.

products.name: Capsules
products.description: Oral capsule formulations of generic and TCM pharmaceutical products.

products.name: Cephalosporin Oral Solutions
products.description: Solid oral solution Cephalosporins manufactured in compliance with Year 2011 GMP Standards.

products.name: Basic Generic Drugs
products.description: Common drugs in the PRC with large market demand, selected for large addressable markets and higher profit margins.

products.name: First-to-Market Generic Drugs
products.description: Generic drugs new to the PRC marketplace.

products.name: Modern Traditional Chinese Medicines (TCMs)
products.description: Non-synthetic, plant-based medicinal compounds produced using modern techniques in tablet, capsule, or powder formulations.

products.name: Healthcare and Protective Products
products.description: Comprehensive healthcare and protective products manufactured by Helpson.
